title: Portfolio v2
description: My proof of work for hiring teams — built in 2 weeks with Next.js 15.
longDescription: Portfolio website showcasing 5 production projects, skills, and experience. Built with Next.js 15 App Router, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, and shadcn/ui. Static content via JSON, editorial minimalist design, deployed on Vercel.
impact: Showcases 5 production projects to hiring teams

title: Task Management App
description: Built for a 3-person team to ship faster — real-time task sync via WebSocket, now used by 500+ people.
longDescription: Collaborative task management tool with React and Node.js. Real-time updates via WebSocket, drag-and-drop task reordering, team collaboration, and project-based organization. Grew to 500+ active users.

title: E-Commerce API
description: E-commerce backend processing 1K+ orders/month — JWT auth, Stripe payments, PostgreSQL.
longDescription: Backend API powering an e-commerce platform handling 1K+ orders/month. JWT authentication, product catalog, shopping cart, Stripe payment integration, and order tracking. Built with Express.js and PostgreSQL.

title: Weather Dashboard
description: Interactive weather dashboard with location search and 7-day forecasts.
longDescription: A responsive weather dashboard that displays current conditions, hourly forecasts, and 7-day outlooks. Features location search, geolocation support, and data visualization with charts. Consumes OpenWeatherMap API.

title: CLI Productivity Tool
description: Command-line tool for managing development workflows and shortcuts.
longDescription: A developer productivity CLI built with Node.js. Automates common development tasks like project scaffolding, git workflows, deployment scripts, and environment setup. Distributed via npm.

title: CRM Platform
description: Internal CRM system for managing client relationships and sales pipelines at Promete Technology.
longDescription: Full-stack CRM platform built for Promete Technology to streamline client management, track sales pipelines, and automate follow-ups. Features role-based access control, real-time dashboards, and email integration.

title: Inventory Management System
description: E-commerce inventory tracking system with real-time stock sync across multiple channels.
longDescription: Backend-heavy inventory management system for an e-commerce client at Promete. Real-time stock synchronization across Shopee, Lazada, and website. Automated low-stock alerts and purchase order generation.

title: Restaurant Website
description: Modern restaurant website with online menu, reservation system, and Google Maps integration.
longDescription: Freelance project: responsive restaurant website with digital menu, table reservation via form submission, Google Maps embed, and SEO optimization. Delivered in 1 week, deployed on Vercel.

title: Dental Clinic Booking App
description: Online appointment booking system for a dental clinic — patient management and SMS reminders.
longDescription: Freelance project: booking system for a dental clinic with patient profiles, appointment scheduling, SMS reminders via Twilio, and admin dashboard for managing daily schedules.
